svg.title: AxiomNizam-style Cloud-Native Control Plane Architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram showing HTTP Handler → Service → ResourceStore → etcd on one path, and Informer/Watch → WorkQueue → Controller → Reconciler → External Runtime on the reconciliation path.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the HTTP Handler layer in AxiomNizam')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Service layer in AxiomNizam')
sendPrompt('What does ResourceStore do in AxiomNizam?')
sendPrompt('Why is etcd used as the authoritative store in AxiomNizam?')
sendPrompt('How does the Informer/Watch work in AxiomNizam?')
sendPrompt('What is the WorkQueue responsible for in AxiomNizam?')
sendPrompt('What does the Controller do in AxiomNizam?')
sendPrompt('What does the Reconciler actually do in AxiomNizam?')
sendPrompt('What external runtimes does AxiomNizam reconcile against?')
